messages.body: Now that the divorce is final, let's set a real schedule. I'll take every other weekend.
Okay. Emma starts 6th grade and Noah starts kindergarten in the fall. Your first weekend is the 17th.
Sorry, I'm not set up at the new place yet. Can you keep them this weekend?
Had the kids all week. Took Noah for his kindergarten vaccinations and a checkup.
Registered Emma for fall soccer and signed Noah up for T-ball.
Picked the kids up for the weekend - first one at the new apartment.
First day of school - Emma to 6th grade, Noah to kindergarten. I bought all the supplies and clothes.
Arranged an after-school sitter for Noah since kindergarten lets out early.
Took the kids to church and Sunday school this morning, then kept them for the week.
Can't make my weekend, still getting settled at the new place. Sorry.
Had the kids this weekend. Noah's first T-ball game - I took him.
Got the kids this weekend, took them to the pumpkin patch.
Noah's kindergarten conference is next week. I'll go on my own.
I'd like the kids for a few days over winter break, maybe the 27th to 29th.
Picked the kids up for the three days.
Kids are home. It's been a hard first year, but they're okay.
New year. Emma's in 7th grade soccer, Noah started 1st grade. I've got their routines set.
Took Emma to the dentist for a cleaning today. I paid the copay.
Have the kids this weekend.
Noah's 1st grade conference was today. His teacher says he's doing well.
Can't do my weekend, work trip came up.
Took the kids to church and Sunday school, then had them the rest of the week.
I haven't heard from you in a few weeks. The kids keep asking about you.
It's been over a month with no word at all. Emma's birthday was April 20 and you missed it.
I'm sorry. Things have been hard. I'll take the kids this weekend.
Had the kids this weekend.
Registered both kids for summer camp. I paid the deposit.
Emma's spring recital was today. I went.
Summer camp started. I'm handling all the drop-offs and pickups.
Have the kids for the holiday weekend.
Noah needed a doctor visit for a bad rash. I took him - it's nothing serious.
You didn't show for the Saturday pickup and didn't call. The kids waited for you.
First day of school - Emma to 7th, Noah to 2nd. I handled the supplies and clothes.
Had the kids all week. Took Emma to soccer and the kids to church Sunday.
Got the kids this weekend, took them to my parents' house.
Noah's birthday party was today. I organized it - you sent a card.
Took the kids trick-or-treating and kept them for the week.
Have the kids this weekend.
Had the kids for Thanksgiving week.
Parent-teacher conferences were today. I went for both kids.
Picked the kids up for a few days after Christmas.
New year. Emma's in 8th grade, and Noah's reading is something I want to watch this year.
Have the kids this weekend, taking them skiing.
I'll take Noah's parent-teacher conference this term.
Went to Noah's conference. His reading is behind - we should get him some help.
I set up a reading tutor for Noah. I'll take him on Tuesdays.
Took the kids to church and kept them the week. Emma started competition dance.
Got the kids this weekend.
Emma's dance competition was this weekend - I drove her and stayed both days.
Can we move my weekend to next week? Work conflict.
Took the kids for the makeup weekend and brought them to church Sunday.
Registered the kids for summer camp. I paid the deposit.
Emma's spring recital was today. I went.
I'll handle the camp pickups on my days this summer.
Had the kids for a week, took them to the lake.
Noah had a summer cold, I took him to the pediatrician.
I'll cover the kids' school supplies and Emma's dance fees this year.
First day of school. This is Emma's last year of middle school.
Have the kids this weekend - church Sunday and a hike.
Took Noah to the eye doctor, he's fine. Had the kids this week.
Noah's birthday - I hosted his party. You came for about an hour.
Took the kids to church and the fall festival.
Got the kids this weekend.
Had the kids for Thanksgiving week.
Picked the kids up for the holidays, the 27th to the 31st.
New year. Emma started high school, Noah's in 3rd grade.
Took both kids to the dentist for cleanings. I paid for both.
Have the kids this weekend.
Noah's parent-teacher conference - I went. His reading has improved with the tutor.
Got the kids - took them to church and Emma to her dance practice.
Had the kids this week. Emma made the high school soccer team.
Can't make my weekend, sorry - work.
Emma's birthday was today. I had a party for her. You called her.
Took the kids this weekend, church Sunday.
Registered the kids for summer camp. I paid the deposit.
Emma's spring recital - I went and recorded it.
Had the kids for a week, did the camp pickups and the lake.
Kept the kids for two weeks while you traveled. Camp is going well.
Emma turns 15 soon and wants her learner's permit. School supplies are all bought.
Have the kids this weekend. Emma and I went over the driver's permit handbook.
Took Emma to get her learner's permit at the DMV.
Got the kids - did Emma's first driving practice in a parking lot.
Noah's birthday party - I organized it, and you came this time.
Took the kids to church and trick-or-treating.
Parent-teacher conferences - I went for both kids.
Had the kids for the Thanksgiving weekend.
Picked the kids up for winter break, the 23rd to the 30th.
Let's get this year's schedule sorted. I'd like to keep my every-other-weekend time and be more involved than last year.
Agreed. Your weekends are the 1st and 3rd. Emma has soccer Tuesdays and Noah has Scouts on Thursdays.
Picked up Emma and Noah for the weekend. Taking them ice skating tomorrow.
Kept the kids all this past week and took Noah to his reading group. Good week with them.
Emma has a dentist cleaning Thursday. I'll pick her up from school and take her.
Emma's cleaning went fine, no cavities. I paid the copay at the office.
Noah's parent-teacher conference is Feb 8 at 4pm. Can you go this time?
Yes, I'll take Noah's conference this time.
Went to Noah's parent-teacher conference. His teacher says he's doing okay but a little behind in reading.
Had both kids all weekend. We worked on Noah's reading and I took Emma out to practice driving.
Your weekend with the kids is the 16th. Still good?
Something came up at work - can we move my weekend to the 23rd?
Got the kids for the makeup weekend. Taking them to my parents' house Sunday.
Registered Emma and Noah for spring soccer. I'll handle the weekday practice driving.
I can't make my weekend this time, work is slammed. Sorry.
Took the kids to church and Noah's Sunday school this morning, then kept them the rest of the week.
Noah's eye exam showed he needs glasses. I scheduled the fitting and I'll cover the frames.
Have the kids this weekend. Taking them to church Sunday and helping Emma with driving practice.
Emma wants a summer job. She'll need a work permit signed by a parent.
I'll handle Emma's work permit paperwork and drive her around to drop off job applications.
It's my weekend - I'll take both kids to Emma's soccer game on Saturday.
Emma scored at Saturday's game. Glad you and Noah were there to see it.
Noah spiked a fever - I took him to urgent care tonight. Ear infection, he's on antibiotics now.
Had the kids all this week. Took Emma to soccer practice and Noah to Scouts.
Registered both kids for summer camp at Oakwood. I paid the $600 deposit today.
Had the kids this weekend. Took Noah to his Scouts campout and did more driving practice with Emma.
I won't make Emma's recital next week, I have a work trip. Tell her I'm sorry.
Emma's spring recital went beautifully and she had a solo. I recorded it for you.
Picked the kids up from summer camp today and had them overnight at my place.
Had the kids for the week of the 4th. We did the lake and fireworks - great week.
Kept the kids the past two weeks while you traveled. Camp is going well for both of them.
Emma got the job at the ice cream shop. She starts next week.
Great news on Emma's job. I'll drive her to her shifts on my weekends.
First day of school. I bought all the supplies, backpacks, and Noah's new clothes - about $340.
I'll cover Emma's fall soccer fees and Noah's Scouts dues this year.
Emma made the school soccer team. Practices are Monday and Wednesday - I'll drive her.
Have the kids this weekend. Church Sunday, and Emma and I will get in more driving practice.
Noah's school reading evaluation is set for the 20th. I'll take him.
Had the kids this week. Took Noah to the eye doctor for his glasses fitting.
I arranged an after-school sitter for Noah on the days I work late.
I can't do my weekend - traveling for work again. Sorry.
Made it to part of Noah's birthday party today, had to leave early for a work call.
Took the kids to the apple orchard and to church this weekend.
You didn't show for the Saturday pickup today and didn't call. Emma and Noah waited almost an hour.
Had the kids this weekend. Took Noah to a Scouts service project and Emma out driving.
Went to both kids' parent-teacher conferences today. Noah's reading is improving.
Had the kids for Thanksgiving week. You called and they loved talking to you.
I'll take the kids December 26 to 30 for winter break.
Emma's holiday concert was tonight. I went and she sang a solo.
Picked the kids up this morning for the holiday week.
Kids are home from your place - they had a good time over the holidays.
New year. Emma's soccer resumes, and I've set up a math tutoring program for Noah.
Have the kids this weekend. I renewed both their passports for a possible summer trip.
I'd like to move to a 50/50 custody arrangement. I've been more involved this year and want equal time.
We can discuss it. You have shown up more this year - though I'm still carrying most of the school, medical, and weekday care.
Took Emma for her annual physical today. All healthy. I scheduled it and paid the copay.
Took Noah to the dentist for his filling on my weekend and covered the bill.
Had the kids this weekend, took them to church Sunday morning.
Can't make next weekend - I have a work conference out of state.
Had the kids the past two weeks. Took Emma to a dance workshop and Noah to Scouts.
Emma's birthday was today. I organized her party - you sent a gift but couldn't come.
Took both kids to the dentist for cleanings today. I paid for both.
Had the kids this weekend. Lots of driving practice - Emma is nearly ready for her test.
Registered Emma and Noah for summer camp again. I paid the deposit.
Took Noah to his Scouts award ceremony this weekend - he got a new badge.
Emma passed her driver's test. I took her to the DMV this morning.
You were over two hours late for pickup today. The kids were waiting and worried.
Had the kids all week. Took Noah to church Sunday and drove Emma to a job shift.
Emma's spring recital is June 3. The details are on the school website.
Emma's recital was wonderful, and you came this time. She was so happy you were there.
You're handling so much on your own since the divorce, Sarah. I'm proud of how you care for Emma and Noah.
I don't think David has seen the kids in over a month. You are carrying everything for them, sweetheart.
It's good to see David taking the kids more this year. The children need both of their parents.
You do so much for Emma and Noah, Sarah. I see how hard you work for them every single day.
I'm glad David made it to part of Noah's party. The children need both of you in their lives.
Emma mentioned her dad has been around more this year. That's good to see for the children.
Whatever you and David work out, those two children are deeply loved and that is what matters most.
Sarah, thank you for getting Emma to every practice. She's grown so much on the team this year.
Thank you Sarah - you are at every practice and every game. Emma is lucky to have such a supportive mom.
Good to see Emma's dad at a few games this season too. She plays harder when you are both in the stands.
